data.title: Dragon Shield partners with Hasbro & Wizards of the Coast to create licensed MAGIC: THE GATHERING accessories.
data.description: A partnership has been formed between Dragon Shield, a prominent provider of high-quality accessories for trading card games, and Hasbro's Wizards of the Coast division. This collaboration, announced on September 25, 2025 in Brabrand, Denmark, aims to create licensed accessories for the popular trading card game MAGIC: THE. Dragon Shield, known for its premium products, is set to bring their expertise to this venture, anticipating a significant impact on the TCG community.

data.title: TIER IV and Elm collaborate on autonomous driving solutions in Saudi Arabia, signing a memorandum of understanding.
data.description: In Tokyo on September 25, 2025, TIER IV, a leader in open-source software for autonomous driving, has signed a memorandum of understanding to collaborate on developing sovereign autonomous mobility. This partnership aims to explore various opportunities and drive innovation in this field.

data.title: LibertyStream appoints Huayuan Jiang as Senior Director, Chemistry with over 10 years experience. #corporateupdate #minerals
data.description: LibertyStream Infrastructure Partners Inc. announced the appointment of Mr. Huayuan Jiang, M.Eng., as the Senior Director of Chemistry. With over a decade of experience in Technology, Product, and Materials Development, Mr. Jiang is a specialist in process optimization and scale-up. This addition will bring valuable expertise to LibertyStream, listed on TSXV as LIB, OTCQB as VLTLF, and FSE as I2D. The company focuses on critical minerals, and Mr. Jiang's expertise will further enhance their operations.

data.title: CenterCal Properties and DRA Advisors purchase Long Beach Towne Center, plan for reinvestment and placemaking.
data.description: In Costa Mesa, California, on September 25, 2025, CenterCal Properties and DRA Advisors revealed their joint purchase of Long Beach Towne Center. As prominent players in retail and mixed-use development, CenterCal Properties partnered with the renowned real estate private equity firm DRA Advisors for this acquisition. This property, a significant addition to their portfolio, holds considerable value for both companies.
